_**Agent (composer-2)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
I found the bug!

- Saved to: `getCommonBase()/profiles` which is `COMMON_STORAGE_PATH` (default `storage`) + `/profiles`  e.g.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="read_file_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **read_file_v2** • Read file: d:\Scanning&Evaluation\api\src\modules\admin\admin.controller.js</summary>

<summary>Tool use: **read_file_v2**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Files are stored in `getCommonBase()/profiles/`, though the route references `scanOutputPath/profiles/`.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Identifying a path mismatch: profile uploads save to `COMMON_STORAGE_PATH/profiles` (see `upload.js`), but `/admin/photo-file/:filename` serves from `scanOutputPath/profiles`. Verifying and fixing.



_**Agent (composer-2)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="ripgrep_raw_search">
<details>
<summary>Tool use: **ripgrep_raw_search**</summary>

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="ripgrep_raw_search"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **ripgrep_raw_search**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Only the admin.routes file has the incorrect path.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2)**_

Profile photos are saved under `storage/profiles` (via `getCommonBase()` in `upload.js`), but the download route reads `SCAN_OUTPUT_PATH/profiles` (default `storage/scan_output/profiles`). That mismatch causes 404s. Exporting the profile directory from the upload module and using it in the photo-file route.
